profile.name: Andre Willis
profile.headline: The Maintenance Pro · handyman for short-let fixes
profile.bio: Andre is 54, a self-employed handyman who takes on repairs and maintenance for short-let properties, a broken lock, a dead boiler, a leak before the next guest arrives. He wants a steady stream of clearly-scoped jobs, the right details up front so he brings the right parts, and to get paid without the awkward follow-up. Draft persona, sharpen with persona-refine.

sections.title: Jobs to be done
content: Get a steady stream of repair jobs without hustling for every one.
Know the fault, the access, and the property before he sets off, so he brings the right parts once.
Fix it before the next guest arrives and get paid without chasing.

sections.title: Pains
content: Wasted call-outs: driving across town for a job that needed a part he didn't know about.
Half a brief: 'something's broken' with no photo, no access, no urgency.
Time pressure: a fault that has to be sorted before check-in, found out too late.
Payment follow-up after the work is already done.

sections.title: Lifestyle
sections.content: Andre works out of his van and trusts his hands more than any app. He'll happily take dispatched work if it respects his time: clear scope, the details up front, and payment that just lands. What loses him is a wasted journey.
